errors.notFoundBody: It may have been deleted, moved, or tucked into another part of the library.
errors.errorTitle: A page fluttered out of place.
errors.errorBody: Something unexpected happened. Try again, or head back to your library.

home.hero: Bedtime stories made just for them.
home.heroSub: Create personalised, AI-generated bedtime stories starring your child — with their favourite toys, animals, and adventures woven into every page.
home.featureSub: Every detail that makes your child unique goes into every story.
home.feature1Desc: Add your child's name, age, favourite toys, animals, and the lessons you want woven in.
home.feature2Desc: AI weaves their world into a 700–900 word bedtime story in seconds.
home.feature3Desc: Every story is saved. Re-read favourites any time, any night.
home.feature4Desc: Export any story as a beautiful PDF to print and keep forever.
home.themesSub: Choose a theme and the story naturally teaches it.
home.ctaSub: Create a child profile, pick a theme, and have a magical story ready in under a minute.
home.arcTitle: Every story has a perfect arc.
home.arcSub: The AI follows a proven structure that keeps kids engaged and ends with calm.
home.footerTagline: Personalised bedtime stories for the little ones you love.

dashboard.generateSub: Pick a profile, choose a theme, done.
dashboard.emptySub: Create a child profile, then generate a personalised bedtime story in seconds.
dashboard.subtitleEmpty: Ready to create your first magical story?

profiles.title: Child profiles
profiles.subtitle: Each profile personalises every story.
profiles.emptySub: Add your first child to get started.
profiles.newSub: Every detail you add makes their stories more magical.
profiles.birthdayHint: Used to calculate their age for stories and to celebrate their birthday with a free story 🎂
profiles.appearanceSectionSub: Help Storycot keep your child looking recognisable across stories and books.
profiles.appearanceCoreSub: Choose the traits that matter most. Skip anything you are not sure about.
profiles.appearanceDetailsSub: Pick the details you most want us to keep consistent.
profiles.appearanceNoteSub: Visible traits only. Keep it short so it stays useful.
profiles.appearanceNotePlaceholder: e.g. Round cheeks, dark curls, red glasses
profiles.deleteConfirm: Delete this profile? Stories will not be deleted.

stories.newSub: Pick a child, choose a story idea, and we'll write the magic.
stories.themePlaceholder: e.g. bravery, space adventure, helping friends…

tiny-tales.label: Tiny Tales
tiny-tales.desc: Short and gentle · big illustrations · simple read-aloud rhythm

moonlit-adventures.label: Moonlit Adventures
moonlit-adventures.desc: Balanced read-aloud · rich illustrations and story

epic-sagas.label: Epic Sagas
epic-sagas.desc: Longer read-aloud · richer story and detailed scenes

stories.storyIdeaPlaceholder: e.g. {name} meets a friendly dragon in the garden…
stories.getIdeasHint: Don't have an idea? We can weave some magic for you…
stories.suggestionsNote: These suggestions are saved for 24 hours. Come back tomorrow for fresh ones.
stories.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Include {name}'s trip to the beach this week…
stories.errorNoIdea: Pick a story idea or choose custom
stories.generatingSub: Weaving a magical story — this takes about 15–20 seconds.
stories.emptySub1: First, create a child profile. Then generate your first story!
stories.emptySub2: Generate your first personalised bedtime story.
stories.epubHelp: For Kindle or Apple Books: download the EPUB, then share/open the file in your reader app.
stories.deleteConfirm: Delete this story? Any illustrated book created from it will also be removed from your library.

books.createError: We couldn't start the illustrated book.
books.buildError: We couldn't finish the first planning pass.
books.estimateBody: {credits} credits for about {pages} pages and {illustrations} custom illustrations. Credits cover the digital illustrated book; print is chosen separately afterwards.
books.estimateBodyTinyTales: {credits} credits · Tiny Tales — a simple source story expanded into about {pages} illustrated book pages with {illustrations} custom illustrations. Print is chosen separately afterwards.
books.estimateBodyMoonlitAdventures: {credits} credits · Moonlit Adventures — a balanced source story expanded into about {pages} illustrated book pages with {illustrations} custom illustrations. Print is chosen separately afterwards.
books.estimateBodyEpicSagas: {credits} credits · Epic Sagas — a richer source story expanded into about {pages} illustrated book pages with {illustrations} custom illustrations. Print is chosen separately afterwards.
books.listSub: Illustrated book projects built from your favourite stories.
books.emptySub: Start from a story you love, then turn it into an illustrated book.
books.illustratedPdfReadyPageSub: The illustrated edition of “{title}” is ready to review, download, or prepare for print.
books.illustratedPdfBuildingSub: We’re creating the illustrated book now. This can take a while.
books.detailDraftReadySub: The draft for “{title}” is readable, but export files are still pending or limited.
books.detailExportReadySub: The draft and export files for “{title}” are ready for review, but it is not fully order-ready yet.
books.detailOrderReadyTitle: Print-book package ready for final check
books.detailOrderReadySub: The latest draft and export package for “{title}” are ready for final ordering review.
books.startingSub: We’ve created the project and are kicking off the build now.
books.activeSub: You can keep browsing while we create the illustrations and prepare the PDF.
books.failedTitle: The illustrated book needs another try
books.failedFallback: Something interrupted the build — hit retry and it'll pick up from where it left off.
books.failedSafeSub: The illustrated book did not finish.
books.failedPaymentNote: Your credits have been refunded and won't be charged again until the book is complete.
books.draftReadySub: The book can be reviewed as a draft, but downloadable export files are still pending or limited.
books.exportReadySub: The export files are ready, but proofing or art quality still blocks a final ordering call.
books.orderReadySub: The latest cover, spreads, and export files are ready for final ordering review.
books.planningDetailsSub: Scene briefs and illustration prompts used to compose this draft.
books.journeyIllustrationsWorking: We’re turning the story into a finished illustrated book.
books.journeyIllustrationsDone: The illustrations and review files are ready.
books.journeyPrintWaiting: Choose softcover, hardcover, or layflat after the preview is ready.
books.journeyPrintReady: Choose the physical format that fits your budget and occasion.
books.printOptionsSub: Illustrations are already paid for with credits. These print prices only estimate Australian printing, binding, and fulfilment for the finished book.
books.hardcoverSub: Hardcover ordering will use this illustrated book once ordering is enabled.
books.fallbackExportsBody: This environment is using inline fallback export data instead of stored PDF files, so customer-facing downloads are hidden.
books.proofingPassed: No blocking print-prep issues were found. Manual review is still required before ordering.
books.proofingOrderReady: The current export package passes automated checks and is ready for a final human ordering review.
books.proofingExportReady: The export package is downloadable, but proofing or draft-art checks still keep it in review.
books.proofingBlocked: This export still has blocking print-prep issues and is not ready for physical ordering.
books.proofingReviewNeeded: This export still needs human review before physical ordering.
books.imageLedFallback: This side is carrying the artwork.
books.spreadsPending: The spread plan will appear here as soon as the book is composed.
books.readyLabel: Your illustrated book is ready to order.
books.orderedLabel: Order placed — your book is with the printer.
books.epubHelp: For Kindle or Apple Books: download the EPUB, then share/open the file in your reader app. Images are compressed for Kindle’s 50 MB send limit.
books.mixedArtSub: A few pages fell back to draft placeholders. Regenerate the illustrations to replace them before sharing or ordering.
books.deleteConfirm: Delete this illustrated book project? The original story will stay in your library.
books.deleteError: We couldn't delete this book PDF.

account.title: Your account
account.paymentSuccess: ✅ Payment successful — your credits have been added!
account.paymentCancelled: Payment canceled — no charge was made.
account.creditLow: You've got 1 credit left — top up before your next story or book PDF.
account.creditEmpty: You're out of credits — grab a pack below to keep creating.
account.packsSub: Buy credits once and use them for stories or book PDFs. Credits never expire.
account.packFooter: Secure payments via Stripe · AUD pricing · Credits never expire
account.shareSub: Share your referral link and earn bonus credits.
account.shareReferralSub: When a friend signs up using your link and creates their first story, you get a free story added to your account.
account.auOnlyHelp: Digital credit packs are currently sold in AUD for Australian customers only.
account.auOnlyError: Please confirm you are purchasing from Australia before continuing.
account.usageSub: Credits cover digital generation. Physical books are priced separately when ordering opens.
account.usageTextStoryBody: Includes the story, printable text PDF, and text EPUB for e-readers.
account.usageIllustratedBody: Illustrated books use AI art. You’ll see the estimated credits, page count, and illustration count before generation starts.
account.usageHardcoverBody: Softcover, hardcover, and layflat books include printing and fulfilment costs, so they will be charged per order rather than paid with credits.

share.ctaTitle: Create a story for your little one
share.ctaSub: Storycot generates personalised bedtime stories in seconds — tailored to your child's name, age, and favourite things.
share.footer: Made with Storycot · storycot.com · Every child deserves a story made just for them.
